allow: PowerShell(docker rm englishapp-postgres englishapp-redis englishapp-minio englishapp-minio-init 2>&1)

PowerShell(try { $reg = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/auth/register" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"test@test.com","password":"test1234","displayName":"Test User"}'; $reg | ConvertTo-Json } catch { $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode; $reader = [System.IO.StreamReader]::new\($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\)\); $reader.ReadToEnd\(\) })

PowerShell(try { $reg = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/auth/register" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"test@test.com","password":"test1234","displayName":"Test User","username":"testuser"}'; $reg | ConvertTo-Json } catch { $reader = [System.IO.StreamReader]::new\($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\)\); $reader.ReadToEnd\(\) })

PowerShell(try { $login = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"test@test.com","password":"test1234"}'; $TOKEN = $login.data.token; Write-Host "Token OK: $\($TOKEN.Substring\(0,30\)\)..." } catch { $reader = [System.IO.StreamReader]::new\($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\)\); $reader.ReadToEnd\(\) })

PowerShell(try { $reg = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/auth/register" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"testrl@test.com","password":"test1234","displayName":"Test RL","username":"testrl"}'; $TOKEN = $reg.data.token; Write-Host "Token OK: $\($TOKEN.Substring\(0,30\)\)..." } catch { $reader = [System.IO.StreamReader]::new\($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\)\); $reader.ReadToEnd\(\) })
